title: Financial Inclusion in Rural India: A Case Study of Mahuapur

summary.about: How rural households use banking, credit, subsidies and income sources in Mahuapur village.
summary.audience: Financial-inclusion agencies, banks, microfinance providers and rural policymakers.
summary.method: Interviews households from varied socioeconomic groups about finances, policies, spending and aspirations.
summary.insights: Jan Dhan improved saving and bank access, but caste, shrinking farms and limited microfinance still constrain inclusion.
